queue.summary: Both WASM backend and ray tracer already complete. New direction: build a WebAssembly interpreter — binary decoder + stack machine executor. Completes the Monkey→WASM→execute round trip. Genuinely deep, connects to existing work.

queue.summary: Planned WASM interpreter: 3 BUILD tasks — binary decoder, stack machine executor, integration with Monkey compiler output. New project at projects/wasm-interpreter.

queue.task: Build WASM binary decoder: parse module sections (type, function, memory, export, code), LEB128, instruction decoding
queue.summary: WASM binary decoder: parses all sections (type, import, function, table, memory, global, export, start, element, code, data, custom). LEB128 signed/unsigned, full instruction set. Encoder for test generation. 30 tests, all passing.

queue.task: Build WASM stack machine: operand stack, control flow (block/loop/if/br/br_if), function calls, locals/globals, i32 ops, memory
queue.summary: WASM stack machine: operand stack, block/loop/if/br/br_if/br_table, function calls (direct + indirect via table), locals/globals, all i32 ops, f64 ops, memory load/store/grow, data segments, imports, select, drop. 40 runtime tests + 30 decoder = 70 total, all passing.

queue.task: Integration: import system, run Monkey-compiled WASM, comprehensive tests, README
queue.summary: Integration tests: fibonacci, bubble sort, mutual recursion, host I/O, power function, array sum. README. GitHub repo created. 78 total tests across decoder (30), runtime (40), integration (8).

queue.task: Final housekeeping + git push
queue.summary: Git push, dashboard regenerated and pushed to GH Pages. WASM interpreter added to project list.

queue.task: Research WebAssembly GC proposal (WasmGC) and component model for potential future integration
queue.summary: Researched WasmGC (shipped all browsers since late 2024) and Component Model (WASI 0.3.0 with async, 1.0 projected late 2026). WasmGC adds managed struct/array types — natural extension for the interpreter. Wrote scratch note.
